title: Close out Phase 4 and the roadmap: epic retro + roadmap completion report
description:
The close-out task — and the ROADMAP END (kgh is the last epic; per the two-tier stopping rule this is the hard stop: write the completion report and yield to the human; do NOT plan a next epic).

1. Run the epic-close retro (claude-runner.md): harvest, promote by tier, compact .tick/learnings.md, outside-in verification of phase 4 scope (tk roadmap, TUI view, board endpoint+view, base-branch field, learnings lint, graph nit) against running code, drift review.
2. Sync the installed skill copy (~/.claude/skills/ticks/) if skill files changed this epic.
3. Write the roadmap completion report covering all 4 phases: what shipped per phase, learnings file state, anything awaiting the human (e.g. merging the epic branch / PR).
acceptance_criteria: Retro written as close reason; completion report delivered; nothing left open under kgh
closed_reason: Roadmap close-out executed: retro done, learnings compacted (2 process entries promoted to skill via tick 985, 2 repo entries added), installed skill synced, completion report delivered to human
